tasks.name: fastq_processing
tasks.description: Convert raw FASTQ to count matrix

tasks.name: data_io
tasks.description: Load and prepare single-cell data objects

tasks.name: qc
tasks.description: Quality control filtering for single-cell RNA-seq

tasks.name: normalization
tasks.description: Count normalization, log transformation, and feature selection

tasks.name: annotation
tasks.description: Cell type annotation with marker genes or reference atlases
